items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior regarding 'Scope downgrade on token refresh'. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific results or traces from this simulation, nor does it confirm whether the expected outcome was achieved. The lack of concrete evidence to support the expected result leads to an inconclusive verdict.
